name: HAIN CELESTIAL GROUP INC
business: Hain Celestial is a global health and wellness company that markets better-for-you food and beverage brands across snacks, baby/kids, beverages, and meal preparation in over 70 countries. The company operates in two segments: North America and International. Leading brands include Garden Veggie Snacks, Terra chips, Celestial Seasonings teas, and Earth's Best Organic.

exposures.sentence: The Audit Committee assists the Board in its oversight of the cybersecurity risk management program.

catalysts.sentence: Implementation of the Restructuring Program is expected to be completed by the end of the 2027 fiscal year.

catalysts.event: Exit of Yves Veggie Cuisine business in Canada
catalysts.sentence: We also announced the exit of the Yves Veggie Cuisine plant-based business in Canada, which is expected to be completed in the second quarter of fiscal 2026.
